title: Game Endings Overview
text: Fear & Hunger features multiple endings determined by player choices, recruited companions, and interactions with key NPCs. The endings range from escape to transformation, and some endings are mutually exclusive. The fates of specific characters like the Girl and Le'garde heavily influence which ending is attainable.

title: Escape Ending
text: One possible ending involves finding a way to escape the dungeons with your party. This ending is considered one of the more hopeful outcomes but requires specific conditions to be met. The escape route is not obvious and may require solving puzzles or defeating specific bosses.

title: The Girl's Fate
text: The Girl's fate is central to several endings. Depending on player choices, she can be saved, sacrificed, or transformed. Her destiny is intertwined with the deeper lore of the dungeons and the entity known as the God of Fear and Hunger. The choices made regarding the Girl have the most significant impact on the game's conclusion.

title: Le'garde's Fate
text: Le'garde's fate is pivotal to the story. Depending on player actions, he may be found alive in the dungeons, already dead, or transformed. Saving him unlocks specific endings but also has consequences for other characters' fates. His connection to the Throne of Ascension and the prophecy makes his survival a double-edged choice.
